subject: WM-0073 review: changes_requested
body: High: manifest-declared size limits are parsed but not enforced against the content pack. validateM5ContentPack checks file and total bytes using only option/default caps before parseManifest returns manifest.maxFileBytes/maxTotalBytes; parseManifest validates the declared caps are within defaults but does not compare them to actual file byte lengths or total byteCount. A probe pack declaring maxFileBytes=1 and maxTotalBytes=10 with 2673 bytes validated ok:true. This violates WM-0073 acceptance for manifest/file-size validation and oversized inputs failing closed. Enforce manifest caps after manifest parse or restructure validation so declared caps participate in file/total size diagnostics, and add focused tests for manifest maxFileBytes/maxTotalBytes failures.
